title: Bread, Love and Dreams
writer: Luigi Comencini, Ettore Maria Margadonna, Vittorio De Sica
actors: Vittorio De Sica, Gina Lollobrigida, Marisa Merlini
plot: When a veteran marshal is sent to a small town, he quickly falls for two women: a midwife and an earthy young woman nicknamed "Frisky".
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 4 wins & 4 nominations total
